what_it_does: This file is a ledger entry that records metadata for a channel attachment in the design-assets channel, linking an attachment id to an image asset located at image://design-assets/icons/Staged_Delivery and noting when it was added.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter between --- delimiters with no body content.
The target uses a custom image:// URI scheme pointing to design-assets/icons/Staged_Delivery.
The added timestamp is an ISO 8601 value with timezone: 2026-06-22T12:26:24.009717+00:00.
standouts: The target URI image://design-assets/icons/Staged_Delivery is the primary external reference.
It is a timestamped, typed attachment record in a channel-memory ledger.
The id prefix att- suggests an attachment-specific naming convention.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with kebab-case keys.
Uses an id prefix att- for attachment records.
Uses ISO 8601 timestamps with explicit timezone.
Stores channel, attachment type, target, and added date as core metadata fields.
File path places the record under channel-memory/channel_attachments/.
concerns: The image:// URI cannot be resolved or validated from this file alone.
No checksum, file size, MIME type, or format details are recorded.
No author, version, or provenance beyond a timestamp is present.
No title, alt text, or descriptive caption is included for the image.
notes: A channel-memory attachment ledger entry that registers an image asset reference for the design-assets channel.
questions: What does the image:// URI scheme resolve to in storage?
Is Staged_Delivery a single image file, an icon set, or a directory?
Who or what process added this attachment?
Is there a corresponding asset file or only this metadata record?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the actual content: it records an attachment linking an id, channel, type, target URI, and timestamp.
intention_signals: To create a durable, timestamped record that associates a channel attachment identifier with a specific image asset location, enabling lookup, provenance, and loose coupling between the ledger and the stored asset.
contribution: Provides a stable attachment identifier and a direct URI target for an image asset in the design-assets channel, supporting asset discovery, referencing, and provenance tracking without embedding the asset content.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record with id att-c4432a4a in the design-assets channel that registers an images attachment targeting image://design-assets/icons/Staged_Delivery and records an added ISO timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and reference a specific design-assets image via a typed, timestamped channel attachment entry.
